output:
All four checks pass and NOTES.md flags two issues for the user.

**Summary of this session's work (task 2.2.1-2.2.6):**

- `bob_tools/planfile/parser.py`: implemented `_CHECKBOX_RE`, the `_RawTaskLine` recognize-step record, `_parse_task_line`, `_extract_flag_tags`, `_extract_action_tag`, `_extract_annotations`, plus a `_find_matching_open_bracket` helper that handles balanced nested brackets in annotation values via right-to-left depth tracking.
- `bob_tools/planfile/tests/test_parser.py`: covers each tag family in isolation, in combination, and absent, plus the prose-vs-tag edge case (non-leading `[USER]` / `[AUTO:...]` left as text) and nested-bracket annotation values.
- `NOTES.md`: flagged that task 2.1.1-2.1.5 (heading parsers `_parse_heading`, `_parse_bugs_heading`, `_parse_h1`, `_parse_subsection`) appears to have hit the same orchestrator failure mode as 1.1.1 — `parser.py` was empty when this session began, despite the checkpoint commit. Heading parsers will need to be retroactively implemented before the parser is wired together.

All four checks pass: ruff check, ruff format --check, pytest (246 passed), mypy strict.
